name: Youssef Adly
title: Computer Engineering Student
subtitle: Backend Development | Embedded Systems | Cybersecurity
introduction: Computer Engineering student building reliable software across backend systems, embedded platforms, and security-focused applications.
futureGoals: Grow into a software engineer who can design dependable systems, work across the stack when needed, and contribute to teams shipping production-quality products.

journey.title: High School
journey.subtitle: First serious exposure to engineering thinking
journey.description: Early technical curiosity became more structured through math, electronics, and problem solving.

journey.title: Choosing Computer Engineering
journey.subtitle: A path between hardware and software
journey.description: Computer Engineering offered the right blend of systems, programming, digital logic, and practical design.

journey.title: University
journey.subtitle: Building fundamentals through demanding coursework
journey.description: Coursework in data structures, databases, operating systems, computer architecture, embedded systems, and networks shaped a systems-oriented engineering mindset.

journey.title: Projects
journey.subtitle: Turning theory into shipped artifacts
journey.description: Personal and university projects became the main place to practice clean architecture, documentation, testing habits, and user-focused decisions.

journey.title: Internships
journey.subtitle: Learning professional delivery
journey.description: Internship work added exposure to team workflows, production constraints, code review, debugging, and communication.

journey.title: Current Interests
journey.subtitle: Reliable software at system boundaries
journey.description: Current focus areas include backend APIs, database design, Linux-based systems, security fundamentals, and embedded software.

journey.title: Future Goals
journey.subtitle: Engineering maturity over shortcuts
journey.description: The goal is to contribute to engineering teams that value maintainable systems, thoughtful UX, and strong execution.
